'''Calfa-5''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that orbited a single [[Star/Legends|star]], which baked its desert [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1stm}}
